zh.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham是Simon Eckart和( ) Eckart的女兒，於大約1494年出生在英國素可。她和John Shelley至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1583年4月26日在英國英格蘭素可帕哈姆享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可帕哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham是Simon Eckart和( ) Eckart的女儿，于大约1494年出生在英国素可。她和John Shelley至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1583年4月26日在英国英格兰素可帕哈姆享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可帕哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham was born about 1494, in Sussex, England as the daughter of Simon Eckart and ( ) Eckart. She had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with John Shelley. She died on 26 April 1583, in Patcham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Patcham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham est née environ 1494, à Sussex, Angleterre, fille de Simon Eckart et ( ) Eckart. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec John Shelley. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1583, à Patcham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Patcham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham wurde um 1494 in Sussex, England, als Tochter von Simon Eckart und ( ) Eckart geboren. Sie hatte mit John Shelley mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. April 1583 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Patcham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Patcham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham è nata il circa 1494 nel Sussex, England come figlia di Simon Eckart e ( ) Eckart. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con John Shelley. Morì il 26 aprile 1583, nel Patcham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Patcham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondshamは約1494年にイギリススセックスでSimon Eckartと( ) Eckartの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Shelleyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1583年4月26日にイギリスイギリススセックスプアトチャムで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスプアトチャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham(은)는 대략 1494년 영국 수세스에서 Simon Eckart(와)과 ( ) Eckart의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Shelley(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 4월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 패트챔에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 패트챔에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham nasceu aproximadamente 1494, em Sussex, Inglaterra filha de Simon Eckart e ( ) Eckart. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com John Shelley. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1583, em Patcham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 90 anos, e foi sepultada em Patcham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham родилась около 1494 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. Её родителей звали Simon Eckart и ( ) Eckart. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от John Shelley. Она умерла 26 апреля 1583 г. в местности пачам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности пачам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Ann Agmondsham nació aproximadamente 1494, en Sussex, Inglaterra como hija de Simon Eckart y ( ) Eckart. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con John Shelley. Murió el 26 de abril de 1583, en Patcham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 90 años, y fue sepultada en Patcham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
